commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Wide. Hebrew, "measured "large, and well-proportioned.
Vermilion, (cynopide.) This colour was invented in the town of Pontus, and was used for statues (Pliny, xxxiii. 6., and xxxv. 6.) (Wisdom xiii. 14.) (Calmet)
Hebrew shashar (Haydock) may mean indigo. (Junius) (Calmet)
